title: GEP Event Appending
description: Appending a new event to the GEP event log: validation, formatting, and persistence
entry_point: main() in scripts/gep_append_event.js — invoked via top-level try/catch wrapper
activities: Determine input source: file path arg present?
Try JSON.parse(raw): is Array? → return as-is; is Object? → wrap in array
JSON.parse failed? → split by newlines, parse each line as JSONL, collect valid objects
getGepAssetsDir() → resolve GEP assets directory path
validation_steps: personality_state fields [rigor, creativity, verbosity, risk_tolerance, obedience]: finite numbers in [0,1]
ev.blast_radius: object with finite numeric .files and .lines
ev.outcome: object with non-empty string .status and finite .score in [0,1]
ev.capsule_id (optional): if present must be null or string
key_functions: main() — orchestrates input read → parse → validate → append → report
readStdin() — reads from fd 0 (stdin) as UTF-8
readTextIfExists(p) — reads file at path p, returns '' if missing or error
parseInput(text) — returns array of objects from JSON array, single JSON object, or JSONL lines
isValidEvolutionEvent(ev) — validates full EvolutionEvent schema (GEP v1.4)
appendEventJsonl(eventObj) [assetStore] — ensures dir, appends JSON line to events.jsonl
ensureDir(dir) — creates directory recursively if absent
data_flow: CLI arg / stdin → raw text string
raw text → array of plain JS objects (via parseInput)
valid object → JSON-serialized line appended to events.jsonl on disk
decision_points: Input source: file-path arg present vs stdin
Raw text empty → return empty array (no-op)
JSON.parse succeeds: array vs single object vs parse error (JSONL fallback)
isValidEvolutionEvent: each field check is a guard; first failure short-circuits → skip
capsule_id present check: optional field gate
error_handling: parseInput JSON.parse failure → silently try JSONL fallback; individual JSONL line errors silently skipped
isValidEvolutionEvent returns false → item skipped, not an error
Top-level catch: writes e.message to stderr, exits with code 1

persistence.format: one JSON object per line, newline-terminated

key_relationships: assetStore.js uses Node.js fs module for all I/O
